requirement_topic.en: Connector Strategy — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS2

summary.en: South Africa deployments commonly align with the international IEC 62196 connector ecosystem for passenger-vehicle charging, with Type 2 used for AC charging and CCS Combo 2 used for many DC fast-charging deployments where specified by the vehicle fleet, network operator, site owner, or procurement rule. IEC 62196-2:2025 covers dimensional compatibility requirements for AC pin and contact-tube accessories; IEC 62196-3:2022 covers dimensional compatibility requirements for DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers.
summary.zh: 南非部署通常面向乘用车充电的国际IEC 62196接口体系；在车辆车队、网络运营商、场地方或采购规则要求时，交流充电使用Type 2，许多直流快充部署使用CCS Combo 2。IEC 62196-2:2025涵盖交流针和触管附件的尺寸兼容性要求；IEC 62196-3:2022涵盖直流及交直流车辆耦合器的尺寸兼容性要求。
summary.zht: 南非部署通常面向乘用車充電的國際IEC 62196接口體系；在車輛車隊、網絡運營商、場地方或採購規則要求時，交流充電使用Type 2，許多直流快充部署使用CCS Combo 2。IEC 62196-2:2025涵蓋交流針和觸管附件的尺寸相容性要求；IEC 62196-3:2022涵蓋直流及交直流車輛耦合器的尺寸相容性要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2:2025 — AC pin and contact-tube accessories, including Type 2 configuration
IEC 62196-3:2022 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers, including CCS Combo 2 configuration
Project, fleet, network-operator, or procurement connector requirements for South Africa

summary.en: China uses the GB/T 20234 connector series. SAMR's national-standard listing confirms GB/T 20234.1-2023 for general requirements and GB/T 20234.3-2023 for DC charging interfaces as current standards, both shown with a 2023-09-07 implementation date rather than the proposed 2024-04-01 date. GB/T 20234.2-2015 remains the listed AC charging-coupler edition. GB/T AC and DC connectors differ physically and functionally from IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS2, so a China-market connector design is not automatically South Africa-compatible.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 20234接口标准系列。国家市场监督管理总局国家标准清单确认GB/T 20234.1-2023为通用要求现行标准、GB/T 20234.3-2023为直流充电接口现行标准，二者列示的实施日期均为2023-09-07，而非拟议的2024-04-01。GB/T 20234.2-2015仍为清单列示的交流充电接口版本。GB/T交流和直流接口在物理和功能上均不同于IEC 62196 Type 2及CCS2，因此中国市场接口设计不会自动与南非兼容。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 20234接口標準系列。國家市場監督管理總局國家標準清單確認GB/T 20234.1-2023為通用要求現行標準、GB/T 20234.3-2023為直流充電接口現行標準，二者列示的實施日期均為2023-09-07，而非擬議的2024-04-01。GB/T 20234.2-2015仍為清單列示的交流充電接口版本。GB/T交流和直流接口在物理和功能上均不同於IEC 62196 Type 2及CCS2，因此中國市場接口設計不會自動與南非相容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.3-2023 — DC charging interface (SAMR listing: implemented 2023-09-07)

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger needs hardware and protocol review before South Africa deployment. Typical changes include connector geometry, pin assignment, locking, proximity and control-pilot behavior, cable assembly ratings, labels, DC communication assumptions, and retesting after the connector redesign.
gap.zh: 仅支持GB/T的充电桩在南非部署前需要进行硬件和协议审查。典型变更包括接口几何形状、针脚定义、锁止、接近和控制导引行为、电缆组件额定值、标签、直流通信假设，以及接口重设计后的重新测试。
gap.zht: 僅支持GB/T的充電樁在南非部署前需要進行硬件和協議審查。典型變更包括接口幾何形狀、針腳定義、鎖止、接近和控制導引行為、電纜組件額定值、標籤、直流通訊假設，以及接口重設計後的重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Connector choice is mandatory only where imposed by tender, fleet, network, municipal, utility, installation approval, or procurement requirements; IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS2 are otherwise technical interoperability expectations
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 is the China domestic connector baseline and is not a South Africa Type 2 or CCS2 substitute

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation / Standardization Administration of China national standards public platform

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat GB/T 20234 connector compliance as South Africa connector readiness. Confirm Type 2 or CCS2 expectations for the intended vehicle fleet and site before design freeze.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将GB/T 20234接口合规视为已满足南非接口准备。设计冻结前应确认目标车辆车队和场站对Type 2或CCS2的预期。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將GB/T 20234接口合規視為已滿足南非接口準備。設計凍結前應確認目標車輛車隊和場站對Type 2或CCS2的預期。
